snippet.title: Pani Padhero 2 | Kurai Bujhdaina | Bhim Bista & Eleena Chauhan | New Nepali Song 2021
snippet.description:
Presenting new Nepali song Pani Padhero ( Kurai Bujhdaina) by Bhim Bista & Eleena Chauhan only on Eenakshi Entertainment's official YouTube channel.

Eenakshi Entertainment Presents:- New Nepali Song 2021

|| Pani Padhero 2 Kurai Bujhdaina कुरै बुझ्दैन (पानी पँधेरो-2) || 

#BhimBista #EleenaChauhan #EenakshiEntertainment #NewNepaliSong
------------------------------------------

♪ Singer:-
Bhim Bista
Eleena Chauhan

♪ Music:-
Bhim Bista

♪ Lyrics:-
Bhim Bista

♪ Arrange:-
Jeevan Badu

♪ Mix/Master:-
Shyamshwet Rasaily

♪ Studio:- 
Big Parivesh

♪ Flute:- 
Ratna Flute

♪ Guitar/Mendolin:- 
Sanjib Baraily

------------------------------------------

🎬️ Video Credits:-

🎬 Artists:-
Bhim Bista
Eleena Chauhan

🎬 Cameraman:- 
Prakash Khadka

🎬 MUA:- 
Mahi Singh

🎬 Edit/Color:-
Dinson Shah

🎬 Technical Adviser:-
Rajendra Aryal

🎬 Publicity Designer:- 
Dinson Shah

कुरै बुझ्दैन Lyrics:- 
तिम्रे फुटो छातिमा टाँस्या छु
तिमी साथमा छौ र पो हाँस्या छु
कुरै बुझ्दैन
निन्द्रा पनि लाग्दैन खाना पनि रुच्दैन
मायालुले कुरै बुझ्दैन

G-1
एउटा कुरा भन्छु ल आज म
तिमी नै छौ मुटुको माझमा
कुरै बुझ्दैन
निद्रा पनि लाग्दैन खाना पनि रुच्दैन
मायालुले कुरै बुझ्दैन

B-2
लाली गुराँस फुल फुल्यो बनैमा
तिमी फुल्यौ फक्रक्कै मनैमा कुरै बुझ्दैन

G-2
मुना मदन पढेको कथामा
तिमी र म जिबनभर साथमा कुरै बुझ्दैन

B-3
तिम्लाई सम्झि टोलाउँछु छिनछिनै
झनझन माया बड्दै छ दिनदिनै कुरै बुझ्दैन
बोल्दा पनि बोल्दैन हेर्दा पनि हेर्दैन
मायालुले माया गर्दैन

G-3
जोडी ढुकुर जैले नि साथैमा
तिम्रै नाऊँको मेहेन्दी हातैमा कुरै बुझ्दैन
बोल्दा पनि बोल्दैन हेर्दा पनि हेर्दैन
मायालुले माया गर्दैन

B-4
मनको कुरो मनैमा सिमित
कैले हामी हुने खै तिमी म कुरेै बुझ्दैन

G-4
घामले पोल्छ शितलु छायाँ छ
मुटुभरि  उसैको माया छ कुरै बुझ्दैन

B-5
भन्न खोज्छु भन्नलाइ डराऊँछु
कति धेरै उस्लाई मन पराऊँछु कुरै बुझ्दैन
निन्द्रा पनि...

G-5
आखै फुटोस संसारेै हेर्दिन
तिम्ले छोडे सास नै फेर्दिन कुरै बुझ्दैन
निन्द्रा पनि....

snippet.title: Meri Bassai  ft. Sachin Pariyar || मेरी बास्सै || Ep-686 || Jan-19-2021 || Media Hub|| Nepali Comedy
snippet.description:
Meri Bassai is one of the longest and most popular Nepali comedy serials with 16 Years of broadcasting. Based on rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people, the series represents many political and social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour. It is aired in Nepal Television at 8:45 PM and in YouTube at 9:30 PM every Tuesday. This show is produced by Media Hub Pvt. Ltd. 

The story is based on the rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people. The show represents many political as well as social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour.

Production: Media Hub Pvt. Ltd.
Digital Partner: Branding Bee Pvt. Ltd. 
Production Advisor: Som Dhital
Direction: Daman Rupakheti 
Editor: Rabin Bhatta
Sub-Editor: Ashok Chaudhary
Graphics: Rajendra Manandhar
Script Writer: Kunjan Bhattarai
Camera: Rahul Rai
Makeup: Nirmala Acharya
Title song Writer: Shankar Adhikari 
Music/Singer: Chetan Sapkota 
Guest Artists: Sachin Pariyar/Mohan Basnet
Artists: Surbir Pandit, Ramchandra Adhikari, Daman Rupakheti,  Surendra K.C, Palpasa Dangol, Suraj Chapagain, Januka Poudel, Niru Khadka, Tika bhakta Jirel, Ratna Prajapati, Lekhant Bhusal(Lekharaj), Diwakar Bhandari, Madhu Acharya, Krishna Joshi, Dhanaram Muskan, Sarswoti Fuyal, Dharma Prasad Bhattarai and many more.

snippet.title: कलाैटे र मुसि सारङ्गि संसारमा आउँदा उधुमै रमाईलो साथमा रियाकाे दाेहाेरि Kalaute, Musi, Riya Ep. 191
snippet.description:
नमस्कार ,
सारङ्गि संसारमा आजको कार्यक्रम सधै भन्दा अलि फरक अनि अझै रमाईलाे प्रस्तुतिका साथ हामी उपस्थित भयका छाै । यहाँहरुले हामिलाई दिनुभयकाे माया र हाैसलाले हामी फुरुङ्ग हुँदै हाम्रा देश तथा बिदेशमा रहनुहुने दर्शक महानुभावहरुकाे मनाेरज्जनका लागि निरन्तर नेपाली माैलिक लाेकदाेहाेरि कार्यक्रम सारङ्गि संसार राेधि घर सन्चालन गर्दै आईरहेका छौँ  । 

आजको प्रस्तुतिमा  हामिले  जीवन भर भाेकाे पेटले सारङ्गि रेटिरहने, अाफु राेयर अरुलाई हसाउदै अनि नचाउदै अाउनुभयका , नेपालकाे माैलिक लाेक बाजा सारङ्गिलाई आफुलाई भन्दा बढि माया गरेर गाउँ गाउँ बस्ति बस्ति पुग्दै मनाेरज्जन दिदै आउनुभयका कलाकार कलाैटे गन्धर्व र मुसि गन्धर्बकाे साथमा छाेरा मिलन गन्धर्व , विराज गन्धर्व सँगै पछिल्लाे समयकि भाईरल लाेकप्रिय  कलाकार रिया खड्का काे साथै सम्पुर्ण सारङ्गि संसार परिवार र हामिलाई सपाेर्ट गर्दै अाउनुभयका मिडियाकर्मि साथिहरुबिच काे जमघट सँगै रमाईलाे कार्यक्रम प्रस्तुत गरेका छाै ।  
 मुसि र कलाैटे , फ्याम्लि फ्याम्लाे काे आगमनले सारङ्गि संसारकाे गरिमा र हाम्राे लक्ष काे उजागार भयकाे छ। गाउघर समाज हुँदै उहाँहरु सारङ्गि संसारकाे मञ्च सम्म सारङ्गि बाेकेरै आउदा हामी अत्यन्तै खुसि र उहाहरुप्रति अाभारि पनि छाै । यहाँ सम्म ल्याईदिनुहुने ए वन टेलिभिजनका सन्चारकर्मि ,कलाकार अमृतमान वलि सर प्रति पनि हामी अाभारि छाै ।कलाैटे बुवा र मुसि अामाकाे परिवारबाट  हामिले जति मनाेरन्जन  लिईरहेका छाै सायद याे रमाईलाे काे मूल्य हामी कहिल्यै तिरेर सक्ने छैनाै । र आज उहाँहरुकाे बास्तबिकतालाई बुझ्दै जाँदा निकै दुख लाग्याे । देश तथा बिदेशमा रहनुहुने भगवानरुपि दर्शक महानुभावहरुले पनप उहाँहरुकाे दुखलाई सहशुस गर्नुहुनेछ र उहाँहरुकाे उचित व्यबस्थापनकाे लागि धेरै थाेरै सहयाेग गर्नुहुनेछ भन्दा अासा पनि लियका छाै । यहाँहरुले पठाउने सहयाेगलाई हामिले अर्काे कार्यक्रममा उहाँहरुकै हातमा जस्ताकाे तस्तै हस्तान्तरण गर्ने छाै ।
सहयाेगका  लागि 
कमल कुमार बि. क. Kamal Kumar BK  9841889961 
ताराकान्त बि. क. Tarakanta BK  9847629512  
याे नम्बरमा सम्पर्क गर्न सक्नहुनेछ । यदि याे भिडियाे मन पर्याे भने एक एक सेयर गरेर संसारभर पुर्याईदिन सहयाेग गर्नुहाेला धन्याबाद ।

लाईभ बाजामा रमाईला लोक तथा दोहोरी गितहरु सुन्न र हेर्नका लागि हाम्रो युटुब च्यानल  Sarangi Sansar लाई  Subscribe गर्न नभुल्नुहोला । साथै यस च्यानलमा रहेका नयाँ पुराना सबै भिडियोहरुलाई लाईक कमेन्ट सेयर गर्न नभुल्नुहोला ।

snippet.title: EMIWAY - WHAT CAN I DO (PROD. BY FLAMBOY) (OFFICIAL MUSIC VIDEO)
snippet.description:
Lyrics given below 

Artist /lyrics : Emiway Bantai 
Prod/ music : Flamboy 
Mix &master : Emiway Bantai
Director / dop : Canfuse
Associate director : Sankalp Vaid 
EDIT : Riddhi Hadkar
COLOURIST : Canfuse
Production- Bantai Studio 
Production management- Minta ,Sumit singh
Line production- Sankalp Vaid 
Production Asst. - Akash Gurram, Mohan Shetty 
Makeup- Shyam Shrilal Vishwakarma 
BTS  : Akash Singh,  Shubham Bandhal, & Sumit Fanse

Streaming on All Audio Platforms :

Apple Music – https://music.apple.com/in/album/what-can-i-do-single/1550885290 
Spotify – https://open.spotify.com/track/3iAe6EeL2sDubF42mCadsF 
Amazon Music – https://music.amazon.in/albums/B08V59VMR9?marketplaceId=A21TJRUUN4KGV&musicTerritory=IN&trackAsin=B08V4B4T32 
YouTube Music – https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=XG73UQhA9RQ&feature=share 
Resso - https://m.resso.app/ZSEBBb4B/ 
Hungama – https://www.hungama.com/song/what-can-i-do/61789691/ 
JioSaavn – https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/what-can-i-do/L14nHBJUbR4 
Wynk – https://wynk.in/music/song/bhula-dunga/bl_A10320WT037785766X 
Gaana – https://gaana.com/album/what-can-i-do-hindi

Lyrics
(Hook)
Boht sara hype hai apne pass bro 
God bless uh hope u all grow 
Patte chupake rakhela 
Nai karra show 
Nai bolna bro 
Agar tere woh 
dil se na ho 
Vibe nahi match kre 
Milte nai bro 
Jagah full pakdele 
Hilte nai bro 
Sab kare copy mera tareeka 
What can i do 

What can i do (x2)
What can i do yoo
What can i fo 
i got the views 
They wanna walk in my shoes 
What can i do (x3)
What can i do 
I got the moves 
They wanna walk in my shoes


Chapne do bhai 
Style mera dhapne do bhai 
Fame ke bhook mei 
Karrele nakli ladai 
Rapper log banrele bhai 
Kya toh sikhaye tumlogo 
Ke gane se 
Ek hi baat batarele ye zamanse 
Farak nai padta mujhe abhi kisi ke jane se 
Dil ko sambhal warna toot jayega kisiko
Chahnese 
Boht kuch seekhaya mei logo ko gaane 
Bandhiya bhi toh marti apne gaane pe 
Aisehich thodi na alag wajab 
Apan ayele cash deke gaadi pe 
Selected public invited hai party mei 
Dikhna tha smarty toh kam ki daadi mei 
Haters log latakrele mere Naadi mei 
Inkyamaakya apanich hard hai be 

(Hook)

Itne views lana lala tere bas ka nai 
Seedha shot dete bala 
Khota bajta nai 
Sadak ki boli lekin daam apna 
Sasta nai 
Nakli swag video mei lala jachta nai 
Karne kar par 
asal wala feel la 
Emiway fan base 
Dekhe beta sabka bheja hilla 
Diss gane fekde toh 
Chaddi bhi gilla 
Naklipan video mei aur koi ni milla ?

Ye bhai bante video mei 
Apan kulfa karate aise logo ko audio mei 
Jis jis se bhidjate us us ko pel dete 
Baki jo firak mei baithele unlog ko
Tel dete bolte chal masal 
Apan hai asal 
Logo ko pasand 
Har ek gana apna 
Rehta jashan 
Bakiyo ki baatcheet  
 La*da aur lassan 
Meko ni pasand 
Inlog ki soch 
Apni toh public hai dost
Vip meeting no easy approach 
Kaise kiya mei 
Ab baithke tu soch 
Mei mere dost
kamare fatte 
Blessing hai life 
Machare fatte
Nai chaiye advice 

Ua bitch is my ex bro
M receiving text bro 
Its my turn to flex bro 
I own what i manifest bro 
Soo soo many eyes on me 
blessed bro
I Got no time to waste bro 
If uh wanna move 
There are soo many ways bro
M livin my life at the best bro 
Lessgooo 🔥
(Hook)

#emiway #whatcanido #bantai

snippet.title: फेरी प्रिन्स र आशाको झन कडा दोहोरी | Prince Lamshal VS Asha BC | Sarangi Sansar Live Dohori Ep. 197
snippet.description:
सुमधुर स्वरका धनी बाल दोहोरी गायक प्रिन्स लम्साल र सुमधुर स्वरकी धनी लोकदोहोरी गायिका आशा बि.सी.  बिचको निकै रमाईलो दोहोरी "डोको बुनेर" प्रस्तुत गरेका छौँ  लाईक कमेन्ट सेयर गरिदिनुहोला धन्यवाद । 

लाईभ बाजामा रमाईला लोक तथा दोहोरी गितहरु सुन्न र हेर्नका लागि हाम्रो युटुब च्यानल  Sarangi Sansar लाई  Subscribe गर्न नभुल्नुहोला । साथै यस च्यानलमा रहेका नयाँ पुराना सबै भिडियोहरुलाई लाईक कमेन्ट सेयर गर्न नभुल्नुहोला ।

snippet.description:
Indian currency consists of Gandhiji's image. Do you know when it was taken? Is it an artwork or an actual image? Do you know airplanes often fly at odd even altitudes? snippet.title: Din Gin Gin 'दिन गिन गिन' New Song 2021 by Anu Chaudhary & Naresh Jogi || Paul Shah & Garima Sharma
snippet.description:
"Din Gin Gin" A typical Nepali Cultural Tharu song. This song tries to show Tharu art and culture .The singers of this song Anu Chaudhary & Naresh Jogi are very knowledgeable about Tharu art and culture. Featuring With Paul Shah well known popular Nepali Movie Actor in the Nepalese film industry and Garima Sharma also a very talented rising Nepali actress in the Nepalese Music industry. This song have been filmed in various beautiful places of the Tarai in Tharu Communities. The song is directed by Bikram Chauhan & Cinematographed by Arjun Tiwari.

snippet.title: Meri Bassai  ft. Sachin Pariyar, Aayusha Gautam || मेरी बास्सै || Ep-687 || Jan-26-2021 || Media Hub
snippet.description:
Meri Bassai is one of the longest and most popular Nepali comedy serials with 16 Years of broadcasting. Based on rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people, the series represents many political and social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour. It is aired in Nepal Television at 8:45 PM and in YouTube at 9:30 PM every Tuesday. This show is produced by Media Hub Pvt. Ltd. 

The story is based on the rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people. The show represents many political as well as social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour.

snippet.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
snippet.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isn’t an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyone’s favorite activity, but it can be very messy — and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little one’s outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day won’t take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know. 

Timestamps: 

0:31 — The pacifier hack 

2:42 — A little water, pepper, and soap experiment 

5:32 — The getting along/best friends’ shirt 

7:20 — Face mask too big? Try this hack 

8:58 — Tasty gummy bear lollies
This video is made for entertainment purposes. We do not make any warranties about the completeness, safety and reliability. Any action you take upon the information on this video is strictly at your own risk, and we will not be liable for any damages or losses. It is the viewer's responsibility to use judgment, care and precautions if one plans to replicate.

The following video might feature activity performed by our actors within controlled environment- please use judgment, care, and precaution if you plan to replicate.

snippet.title: सीधा कुरा जनतासंग: Rabi Lamichhane replaced by Samjhana Bhujel at News 24 TV, Prem Baniya responds
snippet.description:
It was Rabi Lamichhane's idea and effort to start Sidha Kura Pradhanmantri sanga during the first prime minister-ship of KP Oli. When Prachanda became prime minister, somebody else stated to run the program. Rabi started another program by the name Sidha Kura Janatasanga. Now, News 24 is claiming the title. Rabi has a tough choice to name his new program in another brand-new TV channel. 
#CelebrityOfNepal #AnandNepal

en.title: सीधा कुरा जनतासंग: Rabi Lamichhane replaced by Samjhana Bhujel at News 24 TV, Prem Baniya responds
en.description:
It was Rabi Lamichhane's idea and effort to start Sidha Kura Pradhanmantri sanga during the first prime minister-ship of KP Oli. When Prachanda became prime minister, somebody else stated to run the program. Rabi started another program by the name Sidha Kura Janatasanga. Now, News 24 is claiming the title. Rabi has a tough choice to name his new program in another brand-new TV channel. 
#CelebrityOfNepal #AnandNepal

#Kurukshetra, #SonuSood, #Arjunsarja
Watch & Enjoy Latest Hindi dubbed movie Kurukshetra Full HD Movie Starring Darshan, Meghna Raj V. Ravichandran, Arjun Sarja, Ambareesh, Sonu Sood Nikhil kumar

The story is based on the epic tale of Mahabharata and focuses on Duryodhana's life as a brave warrior, who succumbs to injustice within the family and meets an unexpected tragic end. Witness the memorable incidents of the Mahabharata including the fight between Duryodhana and Bheema, the arrival of Shakuni, Draupadi's Vastraharan, and the war of Kurukshetra.

snippet.title: Khesari Lal Yadav | Apni To Jaise Taise | अपनी तो जैसे तैसे | Shilpi Raj | Latest Bhojpuri Song 2021
snippet.description:
Lehnga Lucknaowa aur Dhamaka Hoi Aara Mein jaise dhamakedar gaano ke baad Khesari Lal Yadav & Shilpi Raj aa gaye hai ek Aur super hit gaane ke saath: “Apni To Jaise Taise”. Zara suniye aur comments mein bataiye ki gana kaisa laga. 

Song Credits 
Song: Apni To Jaise Taise
Artist: Khesari Lal Yadav & Shilpi Raj 
Feat : Ayushi Tiwari
Music: Arya Sharma
Lyricist: Vijay Chauhan
Director: Bibhanshu Tiwari 
Ast Director: Chand Akhtar
Chorigrapher: Lucky Vishwakarma  
Dop: Firoz Khan 
Editor: Rishu Singh 
VFX : Mohd. Farhan Jada 
Post Production - 3 Studio ( Mumbai )

Original Credits 
Artist: Kishore Kumar
Music: Kalyanji-Anandji
Lyricist: Prakash Mehra


#ApniToJaiseTaise
#KhesariLalYadav
#BhojpuriSong2021
#ShilpiRaj

Lyrics 
f_bigdata mood kahen dekhi Attitude ae sanvaraku 
10 jage lageni 10 go se bajheni 
kahatani khud ae sanvaraku 

m_loot lihi maja kavano, de dihi saja kavano, 
mah dihi mahiya ke, kha jai dahiya ke chhaali 
,,,, 

apni to jaise taise, thodi aise ya vaise kat jayegi ...... 
apaka kya hoga janaabe ali
apaka kya hoga 
apaka kya hoga janaabe ali 
apaka kya hoga 

m_kamar lachakaavataaru pataree, 
dekhahi mein laagelu chhihataree, 
god tor baandhe khaatir 
tora ke chhaane khaatir ,
kam pad jai saala rasaree 

f_tere jaise kitano ko gach maine kiya 
bahute lavaando ko tach maine kiya 

m_aphat bove ke pari, 
sab kuchh khove ke pari,
raton din aah bhari ke,
tora rove ke pari khali 
,,,, 

apni to jaise taise, thodi aise ya vaise kat jayegi ...... 
apaka kya hoga janaabe ali
apaka kya hoga 
apaka kya hoga janaabe ali 
apaka kya hoga

m_kaboo mein rakhu apana manva ke, 
detani likhi ke ham panva pe 
jid mat thanal kara,
baat tani manal kara,
khesari vijay chauhanva ke 

f_dher log ke jinagi tabah kaile bani 
ehi se na aaj le biyah kaile bani 

m_aithal chhoot jayi,
sab dhan loot jayi 
jiyaboo sapanva mein 
sobhi na kanva mein baali 

apni to jaise taise, thodi aise ya vaise kat jayegi ...... 
apaka kya hoga janaabe ali
apaka kya hoga 
apaka kya hoga janaabe ali 
apaka kya hoga









F_बिगड़ता मूड काहें देखी अटटीटयुड ए संवरकु
10 जगे लागेनी 10 गो से बाझेनी
कहतानी खुद ए संवरकु

M_लूट लिही माजा कवनो, दे दिही साजा कवनो, मह दिही महिया के,खा जाइ दहिया के छाली
,,,,
अपनी तो जैसे तैसे ,थोड़ी ऐसे या वैसे कट जाएगी ।।।।।।
आपका क्या होगा जनाबे आली
    आपका क्या होगा
आपका क्या होगा जनाबे आली
    आपका क्या होगा

M_कमर लचकावतारु पतरी, देखहि में लागेलु छिहतरी,
गोड़ तोर बांधे खातिर तोरा के छाने खातिर ,कम पड़ जाइ साला रसरी

F_तेरे जैसे कितनो को गच मैने किया
बहुते लवांडो को टच मैने किया

M_आफत बोवे के परी ,सबकुछ खोवे के परी ,रातों दिन आह भरके,तोरा रोवे के परी खाली

,,,,
अपनी तो जैसे तैसे ,थोड़ी ऐसे या वैसे कट जाएगी ।।।।।।
आपका क्या होगा जनाबे आली
    आपका क्या होगा
आपका क्या होगा जनाबे आली
    आपका क्या होगा

M_काबू में राखु अपना मनवा के,
  देतानी लिखके हम पानावा पे
जीद मत ठानल कर ,बात तनी मानल कर ,खेसारी विजय चऊहानावा के 

F_ढेर लोग के जिनगी तबाह कइले बानी
एहीसे ना आजले बियाह कइले बानी

M_आइठल छूट जाई, सब धन लूट जाइ
जियबू सपानवा में सभी ना कानवा में बाली


अपनी तो जैसे तैसे।।।।।।।
थोड़ी ऐसे या वैसे।।।।।।।।
आपका क्या होगा।।।।।।।

snippet.title: Nepal में Pushpa Kamal Dahal की रैली में आए मधेसी India के समर्थन में क्या बोले? (BBC Hindi)
snippet.description:
नेपाल के पूर्व प्रधानमंत्री पुष्प कमल दहल प्रचंड ने राजधानी काठमांडू में एक रैली करके अपनी ताक़त दिखाई है. नेपाल में सियासी संकट अभी जारी है. काठमांडू में बीबीसी संवाददाता रजनीश कुमार ने प्रचंड की रैली में आए कुछ लोगों से बात की. 

कैमरा: दीपेश शाही

#Nepal #Kathmandu #NepalPolitics

Corona Virus से जुड़े और दिलचस्प वीडियो देखने के लिए यहां क्लिक करें : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=npgvIvfmNkE&list=PLYxuvEJLss6ByutcqkthikPxV3ccUkwPB

कोरोना वायरस से जुड़ी सारी प्रामाणिक ख़बरें पढ़ने के लिए क्लिक करें : https://www.bbc.com/hindi/international-51848794

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong – Official Trailer
snippet.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
 
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, “Godzilla vs. Kong,” the next epic adventure in Legendary’s cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in “Godzilla vs. Kong” as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titans—instigated by unseen forces—is only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander Skarsgård (“Big Little Lies,” “The Little Drummer Girl”), Millie Bobby Brown (“Stranger Things”), Rebecca Hall (“Christine,” “Professor Marston and the Wonder Women”), Brian Tyree Henry (“Joker,” “Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse”), Shun Oguri (“Weathering with You”), Eiza González (“Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw”), Julian Dennison (“Deadpool 2”), with Kyle Chandler (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters”) and Demián Bichir (“The Nun,” “The Hateful Eight”).
Wingard (“The Guest,” “You’re Next”) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (“Thor: Ragnarok”) and Max Borenstein (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters,” “Kong: Skull Island”), story by Terry Rossio (“Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No Tales”) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters”), based on the character “Godzilla” owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The director’s behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (“The Mummy,” “World War Z”), production designers Owen Paterson (“Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,” “Godzilla”) and Thomas S. Hammock (“Blair Witch”), editor Josh Schaeffer (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters”), costume designer Ann Foley (“Skyscraper”) and visual effects supervisor John “DJ” DesJardin (upcoming “Zack Snyder’s Justice League”).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, “Godzilla vs. Kong.”  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.

snippet.title: CID Team को मिला एक महत्वपूर्ण Clue! | CID | Most Viewed
snippet.description:
Subscribe to Sony Pal: 
https://www.youtube.com/user/sonypalindia?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch Most Viewed clips:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLfyXOEyr93G2qps16ADXNqjds8djQzTsK

Tanya, a little girl is found at the Delhi airport with a boarding pass of Mumbai. Believing that the girl came from Mumbai, the airport authorities decided to send her back with an air hostess. But upon reaching Mumbai, Tanya goes missing yet again

About CID: 
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. the team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues.

#cid
#crime

snippet.title: District 13 IN HINDI | Hollywood Hindi Dubbed FULL ACTION Movie | Cyril Raffaelli
snippet.description:
Check our new Hollywood TAMIL Channel for Full Movies Dubbed in Tamil - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC8Nt97MD1kNEobv25LqGIqA

- Subscribe to watch latest #HollywoodMovies Dubbed in Hindi - http://bit.ly/sub-hollywoodhindi 

#District13 : Ultimatum is a 2004 French #ActionFilm directed by Pierre Morel starring #DavidBelle, #CyrilRaffaelli And Dany Verrisimo. 

The film is notable for its depiction of parkour in a number of stunt sequences that were completed without the use of wires or computer generated effects. Because of this, some film critics have drawn comparisons to the popular Thai film Ong-Bak.

Synopsis: Captain Damien must team up with Leito, a local insurgent from District 13, to defuse a neutron bomb that has fallen into the hands of a local drug lord, Taha, and rescue Leito's sister Lola.

Do watch this NEW RELEASED HOLLYWOOD HINDI ACTION MOVIE NOW !!

****Starring : - David Belle, Cyril Raffaelli, Dany Verrisimo, Bibi Naceri And Tony D'Amario.

snippet.title: ¡SUPERHEROES EN LA ESCUELA! || ¡Formas Extrañas De Meter Comida En Clase Por KABOOM!
snippet.description:
¿Te gustaría llevar comida a escondidas a la escuela? ¡Aquí nuestros superhéroes te dirán cómo hacerlo!

Veremos cómo utilizan sus superpoderes no solo para salvar al mundo sino también para hacer uno que otro truco a sus profesores, provocando divertidas situaciones en la escuela. ¡Revisa todas estas formas curiosas en que los superhéroes ocultan comida en clases, por Kaboom!

Si disfrutaste este video, también te puede gustar ”13 Ways to SNEAK PETS INTO THE MOVIES! Sneak Pets Not Snacks into The Movies by KABOOM!”  https://youtu.be/u-MVAzrW5Xs

¿Te gustó la música de nuestro video? Encuéntrala en EpidemicSound: https://bit.ly/2JcUlBa

snippet.title: Budget 2021-22 LIVE: बजट 2021-22 Live |  Modi Government's Budget 2021 | Nirmala Sitharaman
snippet.description:
Budget 2021-22: Budget 2021-22: मोदी सरकार के दूसरे कार्यकाल का तीसरा बजट सोमवार को पेश हो गया. वित्तमंत्री Nirmala Sitharaman ने देश का आम बजट पेश क‍िया. बजट पेश करने के बाद बतौर वित्त मंत्री निर्मला सीतारमण ने अपना तीसरा बजट भाषण द‍िया. Corona महामारी के बीच ये पहला बजट है. वहीं 1952 के बाद सबसे खराब अर्थव्यवस्था की छाया में भी यह पहला बजट है. जिसपर अब Nirmala Sitharaman press conference कर रही हैं सुनिए.
बता दें कि बजट पर PM Modi Live: PM Modi ने सोमवार को पेश हुए बजट पर अपनी प्रतिक्रिया दी. PM Modi ने कहा कि ये बजट नए भारत के आत्मविश्वास को उजागर करने वाला बजट है. बजट देश के इंफ्रास्ट्रक्चर में बदलाव लाएगा, साथ ही युवाओं को कई मौके देने का काम करेगा. PM Modi ने कहा कि ऐसे बजट कम ही देखने को मिलते हैं, जिसकी शुरुआत में अच्छे रिस्पॉन्स आए. PM Modi बोले कि चुनौतियों के बावजूद हमारी सरकार ने बजट को ट्रांसपेरेंट बनाने पर ज़ोर दिया. PM Modi ने कहा कि भारत Corona काल में काफी प्रो-एक्टिव रहा है.

#Budget2021 #Budget2021Live #NirmalaSitharamanBudgetSpeechLive #ATLiveStream

PM Modi ने कहा कि भारत Corona काल में काफी प्रो-एक्टिव रहा है.

snippet.description:

गुप्ता फ़ैमिली के बारे में जानने के लिए यहां पहुंचें- https://youtu.be/eSnusXtDQx8

Duniyadari Episode 235.
In this episode, Saurabh Dwivedi talks about the recent military coup in Myanmar. President and State-counsellor as well as senior cabinet ministers have been detained by the Army. Emergency has been declared for a year in the country.

Myanmar’s military has taken power and declared a state of emergency after detaining civilian leader Aung San Suu Kyi and other senior government officials in a series of early morning raids that followed days of escalating tension over the outcome of the November election, which the ruling party won by a landslide.
A video address broadcast on military-owned television said power had been handed to the commander-in-chief of the armed forces, Senior General Min Aung Hlaing. Watch the latest episode of Duniyadari to know all about the recent coup and past history of Myanmar.

snippet.description:
Eel fish is very common fish in our country but to catch them is very hard. Stop Motion ASMR Underground Big Fish Eating Trap primitive "experiment" Cooking by Cuckoo. You need to be strong and strout to catch them. But today we are mentioning busy to catch them. Firstly we found a eel fish hole and started digging inside the deep mud. It was surprised there was absolutely in fish.
Thank you for watching our video! Hope you.

ko.title: ASMR Experiment 이상한 음식 Cuckoo - 지하 대어 먹는 장어 함정 원시 실험 쿠쿠 요리
ko.description:
장어 물고기는 우리나라에서 매우 흔한 물고기이지만 잡는 것은 매우 어렵습니다. Stop Motion ASMR Underground Big Fish Eating Trap 원시 "실험"쿠킹 요리. 그들을 잡으려면 강하고 힘써야합니다. 그러나 오늘 우리는 그들을 잡으려고 바쁘다는 것을 언급하고 있습니다. 먼저 장어 구멍을 발견하고 깊은 진흙 속을 파기 시작했습니다. 물고기에 절대적으로있는 것이 놀랐습니다.
저희 영상을 봐 주셔서 감사합니다! 당신이 그러기를 바란다.
▬▬▬▬▬
0:00 깊은 진흙 아래에서 노란색 괴물 장어 물고기 잡기
3:25 묵방 문어 물낚시 베스트 낚시
5:09 장어 함정 실험 요리!
7:08 믿을 수없는 메기, 장어 생선 요리
▬▬▬▬▬

es.title: Cocinar stop motion ASMR -  subterráneo anguila Trampa para peces Experimento Cuckoo de primitiva
es.description:
La anguila es un pez muy común en nuestro país pero su captura es muy difícil. Stop Motion ASMR Underground Big Fish Eating Trap "experimento" primitivo Cooking by Cuckoo. Necesitas ser fuerte y luchar para atraparlos. Pero hoy estamos hablando de estar ocupado para atraparlos. En primer lugar, encontramos un agujero para pescar anguilas y comenzamos a cavar en el lodo profundo. Se sorprendió de que hubiera absolutamente pescado.
¡Gracias por ver nuestro video! Te esperamos.
▬▬▬▬▬

3:25 Mukbang Octopus Pollicipes Mejor pesca

hi.title: रुकें प्रस्ताव प्रयोग ASMR - भूमिगत बड़ी मछली खाने ईल मछली जाल आदिम प्रयोग खाना पकाने कोयल
hi.description:
हमारे देश में ईल मछली बहुत आम मछली है लेकिन इन्हें पकड़ना बहुत कठिन है। स्टॉप मोशन ASMR अंडरग्राउंड बड़ी मछली खाने वाली ट्रिम आदिम "प्रयोग" कोयल द्वारा खाना बनाना। आपको उन्हें पकड़ने के लिए मजबूत और सख्त होने की जरूरत है। लेकिन आज हम उन्हें पकड़ने के लिए व्यस्त का उल्लेख कर रहे हैं। सबसे पहले हमने एक ईल मछली का छेद पाया और गहरी मिट्टी के अंदर खुदाई शुरू की। यह आश्चर्य की बात थी कि मछली में बिल्कुल था।
हमारे वीडियो को देखने के लिए धन्यवाद! आपसे आशा है।
▬▬▬▬▬
0:00 डीप मड के नीचे से पीले राक्षस मछली पकड़ना
3:25 मुकाबांग ऑक्टोपस परागण सर्वश्रेष्ठ मत्स्य पालन
5:09 ईल्स फिश ट्रैप एक्सपेरिमेंट कुकिंग!
7:08 अविश्वसनीय कैटफ़िश, मछली खाना पकाना
▬▬▬▬▬
👉 चेतावनी: यह वास्तविक नहीं है, इसे मत खाओ!
राक्षस कीड़े से मुंगबंग बीबीक्यू चिकन 70m बार देखे गए: https://youtu.be/o-QQr7sGEgg
► ► स्टॉप मोशन ASMR - स्वादिष्ट सांप: https://youtu.be/nIG3iJbkEfo
► out प्रयोग ASMR: https://youtu.be/E_xfTruZRb4
अधिक वीडियो के लिए SUBSCRIBE करें: https:// कोयल https://bit.ly/3fBmlyA

सभी प्रकरण स्टॉप मोशन एनीमेशन तकनीक के उपयोग के तहत बनाए गए हैं और बीस्टडियो कं, लिमिटेड के स्वामित्व में हैं। फिर से न करें। शब्द विचार, बहुत धन्यवाद @Stop Motion कुकिंग

vi.title: Dừng chuyển động Thử nghiệm ASMR Lươn dưới lòng đất bùn Nấu Ăn nguyên thủy từ chối hiểu trên đá, bùn
vi.description:
Lươn là loại cá rất phổ biến ở nước ta nhưng để bắt được chúng thì rất vất vả. Stop Motion ASMR Cá Lớn Ăn Bẫy Nguyên Thủy "thí nghiệm" Nấu ăn của Cuckoo. Bạn cần phải mạnh mẽ và di chuyển để bắt chúng. Nhưng hôm nay chúng ta đang đề cập đến việc bận rộn để bắt chúng. Đầu tiên chúng tôi tìm một hố cá chình và bắt đầu đào bên trong lớp bùn sâu. Thật ngạc nhiên là hoàn toàn có trong cá.
Cảm ơn bạn đã xem video của chúng tôi! Mong bạn.
▬▬▬▬▬
0:00 Bắt cá chình vàng từ dưới bùn sâu
3:25 Mukbang Octopus Pollicipes Câu cá hay nhất
5:09 Thí nghiệm nấu ăn bẫy cá lươn!
7:08 Không thể tin được Cá trê, cá chình Nấu ăn
▬▬▬▬▬
👉 Cảnh báo: Đây là không có thật, đừng ăn!

snippet.title: (2021) New Released Hindi Dubbed Official Movie with English Subtitles- Ashish Vidhyarthi
snippet.description:
Watch this Bollywood Hindi Action Movie "Insaaf Ki Takkar" (dubbed from Tamil Superhit film "Ellam Avan Seiyal") starring RK, Bhama, Vedivelu, Ashish Vidhyarthi. 

Synopsis-
This is a story of a do-gooder who fights in his own style against the evils in the society and wins justice for the less privileged people is the protagonist.

The story is about a criminal lawyer Lal Krishna (RK) who rescues criminals with his advocacy skills and kills them the next day. The murder mystery remains unresolved by the police. LK takes up the task of saving a group of young girls (medical students), who calls them Mirchi girls, accused of the murder of fellow student Chinthamani. A conservative Chintamani is ragged by them often in college.

Does LK succeeds in that, does he kill the girls like he kills the other criminals after rescuing them from the long arm of the law or does he discover something else regarding the same murder is what the rest of the story is all about.

snippet.title: The Kapil Sharma Show Season 2 - The Big Bull Stars Are Here - Full Ep - 174 - 10th Jan, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to SET India: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCpEhnqL0y41EpW2TvWAHD7Q?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch the full episodes of The Kapil Sharma Show: 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLzufeTFnhupw4um68ni-2wyqenswK2ayG

Episode 174: The Big Bull Stars Are Here
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Here comes The Big Bulls Stars, Ajay Devang, Abhishek Bachchan, Sohum Shah, and Nikita Dutta are on the Set of The Kapil Sharma Show and have a huge laughter ride, sharing their experiences of working with each other. Catch the fun. 

About The Kapil Sharma Show Season 2 : 
----------------------------------------------------------------
Kapil Sharma is back with a new 'Salah Center' (Consultancy Business) in a Mohollah with absurd characters. The wealthy milkman Bachcha Yadav (Kiku Sharda) with his wife Titli Yadav (Bharti Singh) and sister-in-law Bhoori (Sumona Singh) is the one who has rented out houses within the Mohollah and is Kapil Sharma's business partner. The neighbors in the Mohollah are also full of quirks and don't shy away from the antics. With celebrities gracing every episode, The Kapil Sharma Show promises fun-filled entertaining weekends.

#thekapilsharmashow #comedy #thekapilsharmashowfullepisodes

snippet.title: गोपीचंद की नई रिलीज़ मूवी "चाणक्य (2021)" हिंदी डब में | नई साउथ एक्शन मूवी हिंदी में | मेहरीन 2021
snippet.description:
Credits:
Starring Gopichand, Zareen Khan & Mehreen Pirzada
Directed by Thiru
Produced by  Rama Brahmam Sunkara
Written by Ravi
Screenplay by Thiru
Story by Thiru
Music by Vishal Chandrasekhar, Sricharan Pakala
Background Score:  Sricharan Pakala
Cinematography by Vetri Palanisamy
Edited by Marthand K Venkatesh

Synopsis
Arjun (Gopichand), one of RAW’s best agents, who also leads a double life as Ramakrishna, who works as a bank employee. For years, RAW has been planning to capture Qureshi, who has been behind some of the biggest terror attacks in India. Despite knowing Qureshi is in Pakistan, RAW is helpless. In one of his missions, Arjun goes to Syria to nab a key member of Qureshi’s gang. It sets him off on a journey which brings him face to face with Qureshi’s son Sohail (Upen Patel). Watch the movie to find out whether Arjun would succeed in his mission or not.

snippet.title: 2021 BHAUKAL (2021) New Released Full Hindi Dubbed Movie | 2021 South Movies In Hindi | Latest Movie
snippet.description:
Businessman and gold smuggler George Peter and his driver are killed under mysterious circumstances. Police investigators Muhammed Easa and Isaac discover that it was carried out with a surgical blade, causing them to think a doctor was behind it. They start investigating medical shops. At the same time, Marco JR, George's brother, meets Davis and his sons – their rivals – to ask whether it was their work. Davis's son Abraham starts speaking in a condescending manner, enraging Marco and provoking him to shoot Abraham.During his funeral, Easa asks Davis if it was Marco. Davis does not tell him, thinking that he could seek revenge on his own.Some days after an unknown person shoots Patrick – the mid stander between the 2 gangs – Easa and Isaac take him to Star Hospital where he gets murdered despite being protected with maximum security. This solidifies Easa and Isaac's theory that the murderer is a doctor.

Meanwhile, someone interrogates a pharmacist to know the truth over the murders. Both the gangs start believing that someone is after them.Isaac becomes suspicious of Easa since he earlier said that he had an informant but didn't reveal anything about him. Isaac investigates on his own, discovering that Dr. Mikhael John, the casualty specialist of Star Hospital, is both the killer and the informant. He also understands that Easa is helping Mikhael since they had contacted each other several times. He tells Easa what he has learned in his investigation, forcing Easa to reveal everything in order to prevent the arrest of Dr. Mikhael. Easa explains that when Mikhael was 10 years old, he was involved in an accident that killed his father. Mikhael's mother blamed him for his father's death.

snippet.title: Mero Rato Galbandi New Song 2021 by Pratap Das & Sapana Ghimire | Smarika/Samarika/Bale/Balchhi/Raju
snippet.description:
"Halka Ramailo" one of the best & popular comedy series in Nepal proudly presents the new nepali song "mero rato galbandi kata harayo" by Pratap Das and Sapana Ghimire Poudel. Pratap Das is Nepali young and very talented rising singing star. He is famous for second runner-up of Nepal ideal season one. Singer Sapana Ghimire Poudel is also known as the wife of popular comedian artist Raju Master. 
Featuring characters on this music video are Sagar Lamsal (bale), Samarika Dhakal, & Smarika Dhakal. Sagar Lamsal is a very popular and talented Nepali Actor. he is also popularly known as “Bale Boro” which is his character name in the TV show named “Bhadragol" & "Sakkigoni". Samarika Dhakal & Smarika Dhakal are twins sister and very popular in tiktok. 
Co - appearence Raju Poudel and Marichman Shrestha are also very popular comedian artist of Nepal who are popularly known by their Character's name 'Raju Master' and 'Balchhi Dhurbe'. Both Raju Master and Balchi Dhurbe are comedain characters in a comedy tele serial 'Halka Ramailo' that broadcasts from Balchhi Dhurbe Youtube Channel every sunday.

snippet.title: रियालाई मन पारेकै हुन त रबिनले ? Live Dohori Rabin Lamichhane VS Riya Khadka & Ratimaya Khadka Ep185
snippet.description:
प्रखर दोहोरी गायक सुमधुर स्वरका धनी लोकप्रिय गायक रबिन लामिछाने र पछिल्लो समय चर्चामा रहेकी आमा छोरी लोक दोहोरी गायिका रिया खड्का बिचको निकै रमाईलो दोहोरी गलबन्दी लिसियो प्रस्तुत गरेका छौ । लाईक कमेन्ट सेयर गरिदिनुहोला धन्यवाद ।  लाईक कमेन्ट सेयर गरिदिनुहोला धन्यवाद । 

लाईभ बाजामा रमाईला लोक तथा दोहोरी गितहरु सुन्न र हेर्नका लागि हाम्रो युटुब च्यानल  Sarangi Sansar लाई  Subscribe गर्न नभुल्नुहोला । साथै यस च्यानलमा रहेका नयाँ पुराना सबै भिडियोहरुलाई लाईक कमेन्ट सेयर गर्न नभुल्नुहोला ।

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCL9M...

snippet.description:

Subscribe to Sushant KC's official Youtube Channel:
https://www.youtube.com/sushantkc

Written and Performed by Sushant
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/sushantkcofficial/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/SushantKCOfficial
TikTok: https://vm.tiktok.com/3hTnSe/

Connect with Abhiyan Thapa [@abboye]
Instagram: http://instagram.com/abboye
YouTube: https://bit.ly/2X3bngW

Artists:
Soni Shrestha
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dusky_soni/
Umanga Raj basnet
Instagram:  https://www.instagram.com/jaguar96__/

Prod. by Hardik
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/what_a_rookie
Facebook: https://m.facebook.com/prodbyhardik

Co- Produced/Mixed by LIL ROCK LOOK
(Beats | Mix | Master Pro Services)
Official Beatstore: https://lilrocklook.com
Artist YouTube: http://bit.ly/lilrockofficial
Beats YouTube:  http://bit.ly/lilrocklook

Mastered by - Foeseal
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/foeseal/
Youtube: https://bit.ly/35La74H

Production Assistant - Bigi Pandey / Sundar Tripathee / Hardik Bhattarai
MUA - Shweta Khawanju
Special Thanks to Kapil Simkhada , Hungry Chefs (Sydney) , Nepcoms Services, Amar Neupane

Lyrics:
Kehi raat bitayera hera, ma bina anindra
bhaye ma birami, ma birami
kehi din ko kura tara

sabai sanchai huncha
mann turuntai ta kaha thik hunthyo ra
sabai bhuldai ma gadi ma timi bata taadina
hunthyo ra, ki hunthena sochdai

decisions of the heart never impress me
but i do it for some love
you gotta leave a little room for forgiveness
my fault, turn around

timi risaye hasauna ma
feri risaye fakauna ma
k garu bhana, k garu bhana
timi risaye hasauna ma 
x2

mero saans le timro saans lai khoji raheko jastai
balla talla lagya maya bigaryo kasle
mero geet timro phone ma bajiracha aile ni nadhata maya preetai malai bhari garho basnai
timra akha ooo
adhi bottle bhyayera jhyap jhyap jhai
k nasa cha ooo
falidiye sabai nirasa maile
tyagum ra maya nai
byana uthda naya kei
sochna paye ni hunthyo garho bhairacha khai
barambar timrai
khyal ma auchu ki
bhani kati sapana nai bundyo 
alikati pani huncha ki pura

purana kura, bhulauda hunna ra
udauda yo gham sangai 

kehi raat bitayera hera
ma bina anindra
bhaye ma birami, ma birami
kehi din ko kura tara

sabai sanchai huncha
mann turuntai ta kaha thik hunthyo ra
sabai bhuldai ma gadi ma timi bata taadina
hunthyo ra, ki hunthena sochdai

decisions of the heart never impress me
but i do it for some love
you gotta leave a little room for forgiveness
my fault, turn around

Timi risaye hasauna ma
feri risaye fakauna ma
k garu bhana, k garu bhana
timi risaye hasauna ma 
x2

snippet.title: #KisanTractorMarch: दिल्ली हिंसा में साजिश रचने का आरोप | ट्रैक्टर रैली में हंगामा | Red Fort | ABP
snippet.description:
#KisanTractorMarch: दिल्ली हिंसा में साजिश रचने का आरोप | ट्रैक्टर रैली में हंगामा | Red Fort
दिल्ली में आज प्रदर्शनकारी किसानों की ट्रैक्टर रैली के दौरान जमकर बवाल हुआ. इस दौरान प्रदर्शनकारियों का एक समूह लाल किले में घुसने में कामयाब रहा और परिसर में उसने अपना झंडा फहरा दिया. लाल किले के आस पास जमकर हंगामा हुआ, जिसके चलते गणतंत्र दिवस परेड के करीब 300 कलाकार, जिनमें बच्चे भी शामिल थे, लाल किले में फंस गए, लेकिन अब दिल्ली पुलिस ने उन्हें रेस्क्यू कर लिया है.

#KisanTractorRally #PMModi #RedFort

localized.title: #KisanTractorMarch: दिल्ली हिंसा में साजिश रचने का आरोप | ट्रैक्टर रैली में हंगामा | Red Fort | ABP
localized.description:
#KisanTractorMarch: दिल्ली हिंसा में साजिश रचने का आरोप | ट्रैक्टर रैली में हंगामा | Red Fort
दिल्ली में आज प्रदर्शनकारी किसानों की ट्रैक्टर रैली के दौरान जमकर बवाल हुआ. इस दौरान प्रदर्शनकारियों का एक समूह लाल किले में घुसने में कामयाब रहा और परिसर में उसने अपना झंडा फहरा दिया. लाल किले के आस पास जमकर हंगामा हुआ, जिसके चलते गणतंत्र दिवस परेड के करीब 300 कलाकार, जिनमें बच्चे भी शामिल थे, लाल किले में फंस गए, लेकिन अब दिल्ली पुलिस ने उन्हें रेस्क्यू कर लिया है.

#KisanTractorRally #PMModi #RedFort

Movie Credits:
Directed by Thiru
Produced by Dhananjayan
Written by Thiru
Starring: Karthik, Gautham Karthik, Regina Cassandra, Varalaxmi Sarathkumar, Santhosh Prathap
Music by Sam CS
Cinematography: Richard M. Nathan
Edited by T. S. Suresh
Production company: Creative Entertainers

Synopsis:
The movie starts of with Azhagar, the CEO of a taxi business, receiving an award and GoCabs CEO Vinayak congratulating him. Then, it shows Chandramouli waiting in traffic with a green Premier Padmini. He arrives at his son Raghav's boxing match, and they argue about the car. Afterward, we learn about Madhu, Raghav's girlfriend, and a flashback reveals that they met after Chandramouli accidentally hit the back of Madhu's Vespa. Later on, there has been a series of crimes involving GoCab drivers, and Vinayak cannot sponsor Raghav for the state championships, so he decides to go to Azhagar for a sponsorship. He goes on to win the state championships, and the prize is a Suzuki Baleno. Chandramouli asks Raghav to go for a drive with him, to which he agrees. During the drive, their Padmini gets in an accident with a lorry, and Pugazhendhi, Azhagar's assistant, beats Chandramouli to death. Raghav later wakes up in a hospital, and learns that due to the accident, he can only see two feet in front of him, and also learns that his father is dead. A couple weeks later, Raghav receives a death certificate for a person called Bairavi. We later learn in a flashback that she and Chandramouli were close friends, and that she was killed by Pugazh and his men. The rest of the story is about how Raghav finds out why they killed Bairavi and Chandramouli.

MAILE ROJEKO JASTO ~ TIMI NAI HAU // Sanjib Parajuli and Melina Rai // Saroj Adhikari and Aashma Biswokarma ~ The Cartoonz Crew // New Nepali Song 2021/ 2077
❤️ मैले रोजेको जस्तो ~ तिमी नै हौ ❤️ Every heart sings a song, incomplete until another heart whispers back. Those who wish to sing always find their tune. Presenting a wedding song, the serene and pure melody of #MaileRojekoJasto is now streaming on all platforms. 
Powered by: Kingston Institute Australia
Supported by: Primo Education and Visa Services

snippet.title: चॉकलेट के शौक़ीन चुनौती! Multi DO Challenge
snippet.description:
लड़के की हम आज आप के लिए वास्तव में कुछ खास मिल गया है! एक चॉकलेट चुनौती-क्या बेहतर हो सकता है? हम आपको सामान से प्यार है और हमारे गिरोह एक ही राय की है कितना पता है! वापस बैठो और आराम करो और इस वीडियो को देखने से पहले एक और दूसरा इंतजार नहीं है!

क्या आपको एक या उससे ज़्यादा फायदेमंद लगे ये बहुत बढ़िया भाड़े? याद से इस धन को दोस्तों से बांटें इस वीडियो को शेयर कर के! और ऐसे और फायदेमंद हैक्स के लिए यू ट्यूब  चैनल Multi DO को सब्सक्राइब करना ना भूलें!


#funny #MultiDO #DIY

snippet.title: नई रिलीज साउथ एक्शन मूवी मेन्टल 2021 हिंदी डब्बड |मास महाराजा रवि तेजा अनुष्का शेट्टी न्यू मूवी 2021
snippet.description: Chanti (Ravi Teja) respects his uncle Rama Krishna (Krishna) more than his father Purshrotam (Chandra Mohan). Rama Krishna has enmity with Umapathi (Pradeep Rawat) because of something that happened 20 years ago. Later, Chanti is kicked out of their house because of some misunderstandings, and Umapathi is ready to put Rama Krishna down. How Chanti secretly helps Rama Krishna in bringing the enemy down and reunites with his family forms the rest of the story.

snippet.title: डोल्पाकी सुन्दरी टसी डोल्मा यती मिठो बोल्छिन तिबत्तियन भाषा , अस्पातल नपाएर आमा गुमाईन -Tashi Dolma
snippet.description:
डोल्पाकी सुन्दरी टसी डोल्मा यती मिठो बोल्छिन तिबत्तियन भाषा , अस्पातल नपाएर आमा गुमाईन  Tashi Dolma  Gurung 
उनको अन्तर्वाता लिएपछी १२ कक्षाको रिजल्ट आएको छ र उनी पास भएकिछिन ।

snippet.title: Daya In Disguise | C.I.D | सीआईडी | Real Heroes
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to LIV Crime: 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCzXpAx4v6rFLYXkJZ5nmSvQ?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the episodes of real heroes: 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL0y08jtgaKIVIYFOZ8qi-3qMLgI8sKQmY

Cops come across a case where one after one murder is happening at the wedding.  As cops investigate they find out there is a shocking history of the village which connects the killer and these brides. They also get shocked to find out that the killer was present with the cops all through their investigation. They get to know that that he is members of one of the dangerous gang Teja and the shocking part is till now no one has seen his real identity. Cops have to catch the killer soon before he kills one more bride but as they reach the killer cops gets to see something very shocking. Daya at the Goons Den, dressed as a bride. 

About CID:
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman [played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues
